global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear focus on product showcases and a strong call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection of products with a call to action to shop bestsellers.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a fresh and lively atmosphere.

elements.label: New collection drop
elements.description: Bold, large text in a contrasting color, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Three product images
elements.description: Three vertically aligned rectangular images with reflective surfaces, showcasing products in a minimalist style.

elements.label: Three product images
elements.description: Another set of three vertically aligned rectangular images with reflective surfaces, complementing the first set.

elements.label: Three product images
elements.description: A third set of three vertically aligned rectangular images with reflective surfaces, completing the product showcase.

elements.label: Shop bestsellers now
elements.description: Medium-sized text in a clear font, positioned below the headline, inviting users to explore popular items.
elements.text_content: New collection drop Shop bestsellers now

elements.label: CrispBox logo
elements.description: A small logo positioned at the top left corner, featuring a simple and modern design.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom of the ad with bold text, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: UGC tag
elements.description: A small tag in the top left corner indicating user-generated content, enhancing credibility.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by product images in the center, and the CTA button at the bottom.
